support_tiers.supported: Validated for persistent hidden-service hosting with documented recovery behavior.
support_tiers.beta: Feature-complete enough for broader testing, but not yet validated for production-grade recovery claims.
support_tiers.experimental: May install or run, but is not yet validated for reliable background hidden-service hosting.
support_tiers.unsupported: Not currently a target for reliable hosting.

platforms.label: Linux CLI with systemd --user
platforms.hosting_model: System Tor or Tor Browser plus onionshare-cli, with VoxVera-managed recurring systemd user timer recovery.
current_notes: Systemd user timer retries start-all every few minutes.
next_gaps: Real-machine reboot and network-loss validation evidence should be captured in CI/docs.

platforms.label: Docker CLI container
platforms.hosting_model: Single-container VoxVera runtime with state under /flyers, an in-container Tor daemon, healthchecks, and periodic start-all retries.
current_notes: Container entrypoint now starts Tor internally and retries start-all on a fixed interval.
Not yet validated as a production-grade hidden-service host.
next_gaps: Validate restart behavior with real container restart policies.

platforms.label: macOS CLI
platforms.hosting_model: CLI runtime with launchd autostart path and external Tor/OnionShare dependencies.
current_notes: Installer and autostart warnings are explicit.
next_gaps: Define the canonical Tor/OnionShare discovery model.
Validate launchd behavior after login, reboot, and offline periods.

platforms.label: Windows CLI
platforms.hosting_model: CLI runtime with Task Scheduler autostart path and external Tor/OnionShare dependencies.
current_notes: Packaging surfaces are not yet trustworthy for hosting claims.
next_gaps: Unify binary naming and installer expectations.
Define canonical Tor and OnionShare discovery on Windows.
Validate restart behavior after reboot and reconnect.

platforms.label: Electron GUI
platforms.hosting_model: GUI frontend over the CLI runtime.
next_gaps: Remove duplicate runtime logic where possible.
Ensure GUI is a controller over supported runtime surfaces, not a separate hosting model.

platforms.label: Package-only surfaces
platforms.hosting_model: Artifact distribution only until runtime parity exists.
current_notes: All are now explicitly marked experimental.
next_gaps: Do not promote any package surface until the underlying platform runtime is validated.
